name: Perfect Credit Consulting, LLC
description_short: Perfect Credit Consulting, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Norwalk, Connecticut. Rated 5.0/5 with 115 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Perfect Credit Consulting, LLC is a credit repair and counseling firm based in Norwalk, Connecticut, serving clients across the state and beyond. The company operates in the credit restoration space, helping consumers identify and address negative items on their credit reports that may be dragging down their scores. With a 5.0-star rating across 115 Google reviews, the firm has built a strong local reputation for client satisfaction — a meaningful signal in an industry where poor-faith operators are unfortunately common.

The company appears to offer a range of credit repair and counseling services typical of boutique consultancies in this category, including credit report analysis, dispute preparation and submission, and ongoing guidance on credit-building habits. What distinguishes smaller consulting firms like this one — compared to large national credit repair chains — is typically a more personalized, hands-on approach. Clients working with a local Connecticut firm generally benefit from direct communication with a consultant rather than being handled by a rotating customer service team.

Consumers considering credit consulting services should understand a few things upfront. First, under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), no legitimate firm can charge fees before services are rendered, and nothing a credit repair company does for you is something you cannot do yourself for free. That said, many people benefit from professional guidance, dispute expertise, and accountability. Second, results vary widely depending on the nature of your credit issues — accurate negative items cannot be legally removed, only inaccurate or unverifiable ones can. Third, credit score improvement takes time regardless of who is handling the process.

On balance, Perfect Credit Consulting's near-perfect rating across a substantial number of reviews suggests genuine client satisfaction, which is harder to sustain in a service business than in product sales. However, prospective clients should still verify current pricing, ask specifically what the process looks like for their situation, and confirm the firm is registered with the Connecticut Department of Banking if required. As with any financial service, request a written contract before paying anything and ensure you understand what you're being charged for and on what timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Credit Repair Program
features: Credit report analysis across all three bureaus
Dispute filing for inaccurate and unverifiable items

pros: Exceptional Google rating — 5.0 stars from 115 reviews indicates consistently satisfied clients
Local, boutique firm based in Connecticut — likely offers more personalized service than national chains
Specializes in credit counseling, suggesting focused expertise rather than a generalist financial services shop
Strong community reputation in Norwalk, CT, which is verifiable through local reviews
Operating as an LLC indicates a formally registered business with legal accountability
Smaller firm size typically means clients deal directly with experienced consultants, not entry-level agents
cons: No website listed publicly, which limits transparency around pricing, process, and service terms before you call
As with all credit repair firms, results are not guaranteed — legally, only inaccurate items can be removed
Boutique firms may have limited capacity during busy periods, potentially affecting response times
Pricing structure is not publicly disclosed — consumers must contact the firm directly to understand costs
No BBB profile or third-party accreditation information readily available to independently verify credentials
best_for: Consumers in Norwalk, Connecticut looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Perfect Credit Consulting is best suited for Connecticut consumers who want a local, hands-on credit repair experience with a firm that has demonstrable client satisfaction — particularly those dealing with disputed inaccuracies on their credit reports or needing structured guidance on rebuilding credit. The main caveat is that, like all credit repair services, outcomes depend heavily on the specific items on your report and realistic timelines should be set at the outset. Consumers comparing credit repair companies should also consider whether credit monitoring services, secured credit cards, or credit counseling might address their needs alongside or instead of paid credit repair services.
services: Credit report review and analysis (all three bureaus)
Dispute letter preparation and submission to Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion
Credit score improvement planning and coaching
Ongoing credit monitoring and progress tracking
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
